alternative_parents.description: Inorganic salt compounds containing a tin atom either in its ionic form or bonded to another atom.
alternative_parents.name: Inorganic tin salts

alternative_parents.description: Inorganic chemical compounds with one or more oxygen atoms combined with another element.
alternative_parents.name: Inorganic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Inorganic salts containing a calcium ion.
alternative_parents.name: Inorganic calcium salts

class.description: Inorganic oxoanionic compounds in which the heaviest atom not in an oxoanion is an alkaline earth metal.
class.name: Alkaline earth metal oxoanionic compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of inorganic compounds known as alkaline earth metal stannates. These are inorganic compounds in which the largest oxoanion is stannate, and in which the heaviest atom not in an oxoanion is an alkaline earth metal.

direct_parent.description: Inorganic compounds in which the largest oxoanion is stannate, and in which the heaviest atom not in an oxoanion is an alkaline earth metal.
direct_parent.name: Alkaline earth metal stannates

kingdom.description: Compounds that do not contain a C atom. Exceptions are made for isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon trioxide, carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Inorganic compounds

subclass.description: Inorganic compounds in which the largest oxoanion is stannate, and in which the heaviest atom not in an oxoanion is an alkaline earth metal.
subclass.name: Alkaline earth metal stannates

superclass.description: Compounds that contains both metal and non metal atoms.
superclass.name: Mixed metal/non-metal compounds
